scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm -r typecheck
scripts.prisma:generate: corepack pnpm exec prisma generate --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:migrate:dev: corepack pnpm exec prisma migrate dev --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:studio: corepack pnpm exec prisma studio --schema packages/db/prisma/schema.prisma
